name: CMS: AI Component Provenance Verified
description: The provenance and integrity of AI components (models, data, code) used in production are verified.
rationale: CMS AI Model Supply Chain & Provenance: implement System Composition Analysis to verify the origin and integrity of AI dependencies (cf. the 'Model Namespace Reuse' attack).

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
